description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel oval caseDial style: Silver dial with purple accents, has silver and purple hands and a silver rimFeatures: Branding on the dial and screw to reset timeStrap style: White genuine leather strap with a tang claspWater resistance: Upto 30 metres suitable for daily wear and contact with splashes of water or rain, but not for swimming or divingWarranty: 2 years warranty on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
